title: Demotic Egyptian script
body: Demotic (from Ancient Greek: δημοτικός dēmotikós, 'popular') is the ancient Egyptian script derived from northern forms of hieratic used in the Nile Delta. The term was first used by the Greek historian Herodotus to distinguish it from hieratic and hieroglyphic scripts.
categories: Commons category link is on Wikidata
Languages attested from the 7th century BC
